input.query: Review an AI vendor that analyzes customer support tickets and may use submitted customer data for model improvement.

case.service_description: AI support-ticket classifier and response suggestion tool using customer ticket text.
case.ai_use: Classifier suggests ticket categories and draft responses for human agents.
case.model_training: Vendor terms mention service improvement and model tuning, but the enterprise model-training exclusion is not executed.

evidence.title: Draft DPA
evidence.text: Draft DPA lists personal-data handling and subprocessors but remains unsigned pending legal review.

evidence.title: AI product terms excerpt
evidence.text: Terms say customer prompts and support tickets may be used for model improvement unless an enterprise opt-out is signed. No signed model-training exclusion is attached.

evidence.title: Security questionnaire
evidence.text: Vendor states SSO, MFA, encryption in transit and at rest, audit logs, and quarterly vulnerability scanning.
